HERO.TITLE: Big Fun!

FEATURES.BIRTHDAY_DESC: Celebrate your party with special packages and customizable rooms
FEATURES.SAFETY_DESC: Safe and supervised spaces for parents' peace of mind

PRICING.TITLE: Our Pricing
PRICING.RULE_EXTRA_TIME: From 15 extra minutes, an additional half hour will be considered. From 40 minutes, it will be counted as 1 extra hour.

MARQUEE.TEXT: 🔥 PROMOTION! Pay 8€ and play 2 hours from Monday to Thursday 🔥

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.Q1: What ages is the park suitable for?
FAQ.A1: Our park is designed for children aged 1 to 12. Children under 2 must be accompanied by an adult in the play area.
FAQ.A2: Yes, anti-slip socks are mandatory for both children and adults in the play area. You can buy them at reception for 2€.
FAQ.Q3: Can we bring outside food or drinks?
FAQ.A3: Outside food and drinks are not allowed. We have a catering service with a variety of options for adults and children.
FAQ.Q4: How can I book a birthday party?
FAQ.A4: You can book through our booking calendar in the Birthday section, or contact us directly by phone or WhatsApp at 603 31 55 76.
FAQ.Q5: What is included in the birthday package?
FAQ.A5: All packages include sandwiches (ham & cheese, Nutella or hotdog), juices, water, anti-slip socks, candy bag and chips to share. Cake is NOT included.
FAQ.Q6: What are the park's opening hours?
FAQ.A6: Monday to Friday from 17:00 to 21:00. Saturdays, Sundays and holidays from 11:00 to 21:00.
FAQ.Q7: Can we leave and re-enter freely?
FAQ.A7: No, free entry and exit is not allowed once inside the park. The contracted time starts counting from the moment of entry.
FAQ.A8: We are at Carrer de Colom 453, Nave D52, Terrassa. We look forward to seeing you!

BIRTHDAY_PAGE.TITLE: Birthday Pricing
BIRTHDAY_PAGE.WEEKDAY_NOTE: Weekdays: unlimited play and room time
BIRTHDAY_PAGE.PRIVATE_ROOM_NOTE: Private room booking is for a minimum of 10 children.
BIRTHDAY_PAGE.SAFETY_NOTE: All children must enter with anti-slip socks to ensure their safety.

RULES_PAGE.TITLE: Park Rules
RULES_PAGE.SUBTITLE: To ensure everyone's safety and fun
RULES_PAGE.ACCESS_1: Take off your shoes when entering the play area
RULES_PAGE.ACCESS_2: Put on anti-slip socks (mandatory for everyone)
RULES_PAGE.ACCESS_4: Minors must always be accompanied by a responsible adult
RULES_PAGE.ACCESS_5: Follow the staff's instructions at all times
RULES_PAGE.GENERAL_1: Anti-slip socks are mandatory for both children and adults inside the play area (available at reception for 2€)
RULES_PAGE.GENERAL_2: Parents or guardians must supervise children at all times
RULES_PAGE.GENERAL_3: Eating or drinking is not allowed inside the play area
RULES_PAGE.GENERAL_4: Running is not allowed in the reception area and hallways
RULES_PAGE.GENERAL_5: Children under 2 must be accompanied by an adult inside the play area
RULES_PAGE.GENERAL_6: In case of any incident, report it to the park staff
RULES_PAGE.GENERAL_7: Aggressive behavior and rough play are not allowed
RULES_PAGE.GENERAL_8: Take care of the facilities and play equipment
RULES_PAGE.GENERAL_9: Respect the maximum capacity of each play area
RULES_PAGE.KIDS_1: Share toys and attractions with other children
RULES_PAGE.KIDS_2: Do not push or hit other children
RULES_PAGE.KIDS_3: Wait your turn to use the attractions
RULES_PAGE.KIDS_4: Take care of the play equipment and facilities
RULES_PAGE.KIDS_5: Listen to the adults and park staff
